mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.real_name AS reporter_name, z.zone_name FROM farm_anomaly a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.reporter_id = u.id LEFT JOIN farm_zone z ON a.zone_id = z.id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.*, u.real_name AS reporter_name, z.zone_name FROM farm_anomaly a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.reporter_id = u.id LEFT JOIN farm_zone z ON a.zone_id = z.id WHERE a.zone_id = #{zoneId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.*, u.real_name AS reporter_name, z.zone_name FROM farm_anomaly a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.reporter_id = u.id LEFT JOIN farm_zone z ON a.zone_id = z.id WHERE a.reporter_id = #{reporterId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT a.*, u.real_name AS reporter_name, z.zone_name FROM farm_anomaly a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.reporter_id = u.id LEFT JOIN farm_zone z ON a.zone_id = z.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO farm_anomaly(zone_id, reporter_id, anomaly_type, description, images, status) VALUES(#{zoneId}, #{reporterId}, #{anomalyType}, #{description}, #{images}, #{status})
